calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-11-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Apperances: Francis J. Kelly, Atty for Pltf. Rizalina E. Zacarias.
Rizalina E. Zacarias, Pltf.

Mike J. Kummer, Deft. in Pro Per

Judge Protem: Scott Weaver; Clerk: E. Estacio; CSR: Patty Van Steenberge (304B)

Settlement Conference held. Settlement reached. Terms read into the record.
Deft agrees to change lock in the unit at 725 O'Farrell St., #2, SF, CA. and to provide key to the bldg. manager and 1 to the tenant. Deft. claims he is the sole occupant. Pltf. agreed to changed the front lock , repair deft's mailbox and shower. Deft. to apply for loan to pay the Feb. and Mar. rent by 4-10-04. Deft. agreed not to disturb other tenants in the bldg. Each party to bear their own atty fees and cost. Upon payment of back rent by late Aug., pltf. will dismiss action with prejudice. Trial date vacated. See reporter's transcript for further terms and condition.
